summary: The 'nuniesmith/futures' repository is a mature monorepo for a futures trading co-pilot system, featuring a live dashboard, ML-powered breakout detection (CNN models), session-aware engine, NinjaTrader 8 integration, and full-stack deployment via Docker Compose. Strengths include comprehensive testing (30+ test files), modular lib structure, observability (Prometheus/Grafana), and detailed docs. Areas for improvement: pending compliance features (e.g., TPT hard stops), unvalidated ONNX/PyTorch parity, minor UI bugs, and monorepo complexity from Python+C# mix. Overall, production-ready with high code quality but requires priority fixes for live trading safety.
priority_actions: Implement TPT 4:00 PM ET hard flatten in BreakoutStrategy.cs to prevent overnight holds (critical for prop firm compliance)
Validate ONNX/PyTorch inference parity with a dedicated test suite and run on current champion model
Add input validation and rate limiting to all FastAPI endpoints in data/api/*
Audit and rotate all API keys/secrets; ensure no exposure in GitHub Actions or docker-compose.yml

findings.title: Missing TPT Hard Stop at 16:00 ET
findings.description: BreakoutStrategy.cs lacks time-based flatten for Take Profit Trader accounts, risking overnight positions and account termination. Explicitly listed as critical TODO.
findings.recommendation: Add OnBarUpdate() guard: if TptMode && hour >=16 && positions >0, call FlattenAll('TPT_HARD_STOP'). Reset RiskBlocked at 18:00 ET.

findings.title: Unvalidated ONNX/PyTorch Model Parity
findings.description: TODO item notes parity check pending despite models committed. Risk of divergence in Python engine vs NT8 inference.
findings.recommendation: Implement/run test_phase3_ema9_parity.py extension for full tabular batch (18 features); assert max diff <1e-4. Automate in CI.

findings.title: API Keys Exposed in Docs/Env Examples
findings.description: README.md and .env.example show placeholders for MASSIVE_API_KEY/XAI_API_KEY/KRAKEN_API_*, but CI/CD secrets not confirmed. Potential leak if .env committed.
findings.recommendation: Confirm .env in .gitignore; use GitHub secrets for CI/CD; add vault integration for prod. Scrub any committed keys.

findings.title: Monorepo Mixing Python and C# Increases Complexity
findings.description: Python lib/services + src/ninja C#/DLLs in single repo. Deploy scripts patch NT8 csproj; hard to scale/branch.
findings.recommendation: Consider splitting ninja/ to separate repo if NT8 evolves independently. Add linters for C# (e.g., dotnet format).

findings.title: Forex Tick Precision Bug in Asset Cards
findings.description: UI shows collapsed entry/stop/TP for low-ATR forex (e.g., 6E); rounding to 4 decimals ignores 5-decimal tick size.
findings.recommendation: In dashboard.py _compute_entry_zone(), use symbol-specific decimals from MICRO_CONTRACT_SPECS or dynamic ATR-based precision.

findings.title: Committed DLLs Without Signature Verification
findings.description: src/ninja/dll/ has OnnxRuntime binaries committed; supply-chain risk if tampered.
findings.recommendation: Add SHA256 checksum verification in deploy_nt8.ps1; prefer NuGet restore if NT8 supports.

strengths: Comprehensive pytest suite (30+ targeted tests covering ORB, ICT, risk, scheduler, integrations)
Modular architecture: lib/analysis, core, services/data|engine|web cleanly separated
Production-grade deployment: Docker Compose (7 services), health checks, Tailscale mesh, CI/CD with Discord notifies
Observability: structlog, Prometheus metrics, Grafana dashboards provisioned (e.g., training health)
ML pipeline: Feature contract v6 (18 feats), balanced dataset gen, ONNX export, 87% acc champion model
Docs excellence: README, todo.md (detailed status), STRATEGY_PLAN.md with asset recs
weaknesses: Heavy deps (torch GPU-optional, onnxruntime); pyproject.toml lacks lockfile/pip-tools
UI lacks Trading/Review modes; Grok auto-poll noisy (pending manual button)
No unified DataResolver; cache→DB→API fetch duplicated across services
C# code lacks tests; relies on manual NT8 Strategy Analyzer
Models/DLLs bloat repo (Git LFS mitigates but still ~80MB ONNX)
tech_debt: Trainer UI extraction to /train page (API-only trainer_server)
Settings page for env toggles (ORB_FILTER_GATE, etc.)
Kraken keys in CI/CD secrets + training data integration
next_steps: Run full test suite + ruff lint: pytest src/tests/ && ruff check src/
Deploy NT8: scripts/deploy_nt8.bat -Launch; verify logs (tabular dim=18, TP3 mults)
Test live session: docker compose --profile monitoring up; monitor http://localhost:8180
Address immediate TODOs: TPT stop, parity test, forex UI fix
Retrigger training if needed: smoke_test_trainer.py on GPU rig
